name: ai-agent-orchestrator
description: Autonomous multi-agent orchestration with Plan-Eval-Gather-Execute-Verify loop. Features 6 specialized AI agents, self-healing, persistent memory learning, and supports design, debugging, implementation tasks.
author: Shreyansh Sancheti

tools.name: autonomous_execute
tools.description: Execute tasks using autonomous Plan-Eval-Gather-Execute-Verify loop with self-healing. Supports modes: design, fix_bug, debug, implement, refactor.

tools.name: get_learnings
tools.description: Retrieve past learnings from agent memory system. Agents continuously learn from executions.

tools.name: show_autonomous_capabilities
tools.description: Display autonomous orchestrator capabilities, agents, and configuration.

tools.name: architect_design
tools.description: Generate architecture and requirements for a software task.

tools.name: qa_review
tools.description: Review implementation quality, security, and test readiness.

tools.name: orchestrate_task
tools.description: Run full architect → developer → QA feedback loop workflow.

tools.name: show_model_routing
tools.description: Show effective model mapping used by specialized tools.
